overall.description: A stationary first-person perspective from an elevated urban walkway in a cyberpunk-style city, slowly panning up a large animated billboard for Fuyutsuki Electronics. The scene features bright midday sunlight, modern concrete and glass architecture, and a city street with sparse traffic visible below.

segments.scene_description: The camera is positioned on an elevated concrete walkway overlooking a city street. A large purple animated billboard dominates the center-right of the frame, displaying a stylized character portrait with the text 'SOUNDS THAT WILL BLOW YOU AWAY' partially visible. The scene is brightly lit by midday sun, with modern buildings surrounding the area and sparse traffic visible on the street below.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban walkway with large advertisement displays

illustration of a tall purple building on the billboard background

changed.from: displaying character portrait prominently in center
changed.to: displaying company logo at top with skyscraper graphic in center

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues its slow upward pan, the top portion of the billboard comes into view, revealing the 'Fuyutsuki Electronics' company logo with Japanese text. The character portrait from the lower portion moves out of frame, replaced by a skyscraper graphic and the full company branding. The surrounding urban environment remains consistent with the concrete building on the right and city street visible below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow upward pan from a street-level view of a vibrant advertisement to the corporate branding atop a massive urban billboard. It begins on an elevated concrete walkway overlooking a city street, where a large purple animated display shows a stylized character portrait and the text Sounds That Will Blow You Away under the bright midday sun. As the camera continues its steady ascent, the character portrait slides out of frame to make way for a skyscraper graphic. The scene then shifts to reveal the top of the billboard, bringing the Fuyutsuki Electronics company logo and accompanying Japanese text into full view. This movement concludes with the corporate branding dominating the frame while the surrounding modern architecture and sparse traffic remain visible below.
